title: Gergian Fashion
description: Multiple new hats for your fun!
body:
# Optifine or CIT Resewn Required.

This resource pack uses a name-based system for all the hats that is **NOT** on the base-game.  
If Mojang decides to add that feature to the base game then the resource-pack when ported will be 100% vanilla. 

## Hats List

The Spoiler below contains a list of all content currently. For images check out the Gallery.

<details>
<summary>Content List</summary>
Version 1.1  

-  3d Glasses  
-  Cigar  
-  Fez Hat  
-  Fish Cap  
-  Pikapchu/Pikachu hat  
-  Plague Doctor Mask  
-  Tribal Mask  
-  Respirator  
-  Scuba Mask  
-  Top Hat  
-  Resting Cat  
-  Fedora  
-  Pig Mask  
-  Propeller Hat  
-  Straw Hat  

Version 1.2  
-  Beach Hat  
- Halo  
- Horns  
- Witch Hat  
- Bandana  
- Bandit Mask  
- Riot Helmet  
- Police Hat  
- Nerd Glasses 
- Bonnet 
- Axolotl Pet  
- Frog Pet 
- Revamped Fish Cap  
- Spiked Baseball Bat (Weapon and Hat)  
- Baton (Weapon)
</details>

## How does it work?

To get your hat, just name an **button** any of the names on the hat list above.

## How to contact?

If you have any questions, discover any bugs or just want to talk contact using my e-mail "**ivic.only@gmail.com**" or using discord "**onlyivic**". E-Mail is an alternate and won't be checked up as much so it's recommended for you to use the discord.
